appraisal_events.evidence: « Vous ne savez pas le premier mot des choses dont vous parlez » ... « Mais, cher maître, vous êtes ignorant comme une carpe. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Charlus sharply rebukes Brichot’s claims about reputations and inversion, publicly correcting and belittling him; Brichot ultimately concedes the point, marking a local rhetorical defeat.

status_effects.explanation: Charlus’s put-down undercuts Brichot’s authority in the conversation, leaving him looking ignorant.
Charlus asserts expertise and dominates the exchange, gaining local argumentative authority over Brichot.
